description:
You are a university law library cataloger. Three landmark Supreme Court case references in the Jurism library are missing their Library of Congress KF classification call numbers. Assign the following call numbers to their respective cases:

- Brown v. Board of Education: KF4155 .B76 1954
- Miranda v. Arizona: KF9625 .M57 1966
- Marbury v. Madison: KF4541 .M37 1803

The call numbers must be entered exactly as shown, including all spacing and punctuation.
